quote.msg:
想請問下有無人識MC Q40 INCENTRE果題嘅正常做法
我雖然計到 但我係SUB MC答案再篤四心PROG計的

replies.msg:
x-axis bisects 4x+3y=24 and 4x-3y=24
so incentre lies on x-axis, I = (31,0)

(out-syl method)
|4(31)-3(0)-24| / sqrt(3^2+4^2) = a-31
solving, a = 51

(in-syl method)
let A be a point on 4x-3y=24
such that IA is perpendicular to 4x-3y=24
solving, A = (15, 12)
by using distance formula, IA = 20
so, a = 31 + 20 = 51

想請問下有無人識MC Q40 INCENTRE果題嘅正常做法
我雖然計到 但我係SUB MC答案再篤四心PROG計的

x-axis bisects 4x+3y=24 and 4x-3y=24
so incentre lies on x-axis, I = (31,0)

(out-syl method)
|4(31)-3(0)-24| / sqrt(3^2+4^2) = a-31
solving, a = 51

(in-syl method)
let A be a point on 4x-3y=24
such that IA is perpendicular to 4x-3y=24
solving, A = (15, 12)
by using distance formula, IA = 20
so, a = 31 + 20 = 51

quote.msg:
想請問下有無人識MC Q40 INCENTRE果題嘅正常做法
我雖然計到 但我係SUB MC答案再篤四心PROG計的

x-axis bisects 4x+3y=24 and 4x-3y=24
so incentre lies on x-axis, I = (31,0)

(out-syl method)
|4(31)-3(0)-24| / sqrt(3^2+4^2) = a-31
solving, a = 51

(in-syl method)
let A be a point on 4x-3y=24
such that IA is perpendicular to 4x-3y=24
solving, A = (15, 12)
by using distance formula, IA = 20
so, a = 31 + 20 = 51

Observe that the figure is symmetric about the x-axis. Incentre is at (31,0)
Let the angle of inclination of the line 4x-3y=24 be t.
t = arctan(4/3)
Radius of the inscribed circle = (31-5) * sin t = 20
So, a=31+20 = 51
